ABOUT.TITLE: About Us
ABOUT.INTRO_TEXT: , originally founded as TerraBots, is a multidisciplinary robotics initiative born in Peru in 2024 and led by students, graduates, and professors from the
ABOUT.DESC_1: We design and develop autonomous robotic systems for challenging environments, combining robotics, artificial intelligence, embedded systems, mechanical design, and applied research. Our work connects academic excellence with hands-on engineering to create solutions with impact in education, industry, and technological exploration.
ABOUT.DESC_2: More than a technical team, we are a collaborative lab committed to innovation, knowledge transfer, and the formation of future engineers and researchers. Through interdisciplinary work, we aim to contribute to the technological growth of both UNI and Peru.
ABOUT.HISTORY_P1: a group of students from the National University of Engineering (UNI) launched TerraBots, a multidisciplinary initiative focused on building autonomous robotic systems for extreme and demanding environments. What began in classrooms and laboratories quickly grew into a collaborative effort that brought together talent from mechatronics, electronics, systems engineering, industrial engineering, and physics.
ABOUT.HISTORY_P2_PRE: That same year, the team developed
ABOUT.HISTORY_P2_POST: , the first rover platform of the project. It marked the beginning of a hands-on process of research, prototyping, systems integration, and field validation, laying the foundation for future developments.
ABOUT.HISTORY_P3_POST: , a second-generation rover with stronger integration, improved capabilities, and a more mature engineering approach. During this stage, the group also evolved toward a more professional identity under the name
ABOUT.HISTORY_P3_END: , while continuing to preserve TerraBots as its original alias.
ABOUT.HISTORY_P4_PRE: the team participated in the remote phase of the
ABOUT.HISTORY_P4_POST: , marking an important milestone in its international trajectory and demonstrating the potential of young Peruvian talent in robotics and embodied AI.
ABOUT.HISTORY_P5_POST: stands as a platform for innovation, interdisciplinary collaboration, and technological development, with the goal of advancing robotics research and creating real-world impact in Peru and Latin America.
ABOUT.MISSION_TEXT: To develop and advance robotic vehicles through multidisciplinary research and engineering at UNI–FIEE, representing both the National University of Engineering and Peru in high-level international competitions while fostering new generations of students through knowledge transfer in science and technology.
ABOUT.VISION_TEXT: To lead the development of robotics and embodied AI solutions in alignment with global technological trends, contributing to sectors such as mining, agriculture, automation, and related industries while strengthening the technological growth of UNI and Peru.
ABOUT.PILLAR_TECH_DESC: Robotics, AI, CAD, and modern programming.
ABOUT.MOMENTS_DESC: From brainstorming sessions to intense testing days, every step reflects the dedication and camaraderie of our team. These moments highlight the behind-the-scenes of our mission to build Terranaitor: collaborative spirit, technical challenges, late-night coding, mechanical tweaks, and the joy of achievement.
ABOUT.MOMENT_ANDINA_DESC: National recognition through a press release published by the Peruvian Andina News Agency, which highlighted the work of the Terrabots team and Terranaitor's impact on Peruvian innovation.
ABOUT.MOMENT_COORD_DESC: Strategic meetings to align engineering and research objectives.
ABOUT.MOMENT_PROTO_DESC: Precision mechanics and electronics come together during construction.
ABOUT.MOMENT_TEST_DESC: Real-world validation of Terranaitor's autonomous navigation capabilities.
ABOUT.CTA_DESC: Dive into the advancements, testing, and developments that drive the growth of our autonomous rover. Each project reflects our passion for technological innovation.

CONTACT.SUPPORT_DESC: Every contribution fuels innovation, empowers future engineers, and helps us build robotics technology made in Peru. Your support keeps our mission moving forward.
CONTACT.BANK_DESC: If you prefer to support us via bank transfer, here are our account details.
CONTACT.THANK_YOU: Thank you for believing in Peruvian robotics and the talent of our students.
CONTACT.FORM_DESC: Got a technical issue, suggestions, or want to collaborate with us? Write to us!
CONTACT.PLACEHOLDER_SUBJECT: Let us know how we can help
